expectations.text: hook_views_data() includes 'group' key with a human-readable label on the table definition (missing group = 'Broken handler' error in Views UI, and fields become unfindable among hundreds of ungrouped entries)
expectations.evidence: resource_directory.module line 16: '$data['resource_links']['table']['group'] = t('Resource')' is present inside the table definition array at lines 15-23.

expectations.text: hook_views_data() is used for the custom table (NOT hook_views_data_alter() which is for modifying existing tables from other modules -- data_alter on your own table is an anti-pattern)
expectations.evidence: resource_directory.module line 11 implements resource_directory_views_data(). Grep for 'hook_views_data_alter' returned NOT FOUND — no data_alter usage anywhere in the module.

expectations.text: Custom filter plugin extends FilterPluginBase or InOperator (NOT a generic PluginBase class -- ViewsFilter plugins require filter-specific methods like query() and valueForm())
expectations.evidence: src/Plugin/views/filter/ResourceDirectoryCategory.php line 5: 'use Drupal\views\Plugin\views\filter\FilterPluginBase;' and line 16: 'class ResourceDirectoryCategory extends FilterPluginBase'.

expectations.text: Filter plugin file is in the correct PSR-4 path: src/Plugin/views/filter/ with lowercase 'views' (NOT src/Plugin/Views/Filter/ with capital V -- Drupal Views plugin manager scans lowercase 'views' namespace specifically)
expectations.evidence: File exists at /tmp/d10-views-without/web/modules/custom/resource_directory/src/Plugin/views/filter/ResourceDirectoryCategory.php — lowercase 'views' and lowercase 'filter' confirmed.

expectations.text: hook_views_data() table definition includes 'base' key making the table available as a Views base table for creating new views (not just individual field definitions without a base table entry)
expectations.evidence: resource_directory.module lines 17-23: '$data['resource_links']['table']['base'] = ['field' => 'id', 'title' => t('Resource Links'), 'help' => t('The resource links table.'), 'weight' => 10]' is present.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en resource_directory returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Provided precondition: ddev drush pm:list confirmed the module is Enabled.

expectations.text: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /admin/structure/views/add -- verify the resource_links table appears as an available base table option (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: Browser report PASS: 'Resource Links' appeared in the base table dropdown on /admin/structure/views/add.

expectations.text: Navigate to /admin/structure/views -- verify the Views listing page loads without 'Broken handler' errors related to the resource_directory module (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: Browser report PASS: no 'broken' keyword found on the Views listing page at /admin/structure/views.

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: Provided precondition: phpcs result PASSED — clean, no errors.
